item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 040500Z AUTO 22012KT 180V250 9999 2600 -RA OVC013 15/13 Q1007 TEMPO 4000 -RADZ BECMG BKN020
🟡 TAF AMD LFOT 032347Z 0400/0424 22012KT 9999 BKN020 PROB30 TEMPO 0403/0406 4000 -RADZ BKN012 TEMPO 0408/0418 4000 -SHRA SCT020TCU PROB40 TEMPO 0410/0418 24015G30KT BECMG 0420/0422 26006KT
